case_title: FILEMON MARCELINO VS. MARK PATRICK LUEVANO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEDICAL REIMBURSEMENT LIEN SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CODE SEC 124 FILED BY CLAIMANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (SFGH)
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-15-2015. THE APR-15-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF HANDLING ATTORNEY (TRANSACTION ID # 100001538) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUEVANO, MARK PATRICK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE DID NOT WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS FOR A PARTY IN THIS CASE (TRANSACTION ID # 16166065)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARCELINO, FILEMON AS TO DEFENDANT LUEVANO, MARK PATRICK DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-15-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-12-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-23-2015
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-25-2015.
ARBITRATOR PAUL BEACH KUHL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-26-2015 THROUGH SEP-24-2015.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56674628), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARCELINO, FILEMON SERVED JAN-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUEVANO, MARK PATRICK
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56897420) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUEVANO, MARK PATRICK
JURY FEES AND JURY DEMAND(TRANSACTION ID # 56897420) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT LUEVANO, MARK PATRICK
FEE FOR STIPULATION TO RECLASSIFY CASE FROM LIMITED TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION (TRANSACTION ID # 15299025) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARCELINO, FILEMON
DECLARATION OF ARLO URIARTE IN SUPPORT OF STIPULATION TO RECLASSIFY CASE FROM LIMITED TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION (TRANSACTION ID # 15299028) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARCELINO, FILEMON
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 56897420) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUEVANO, MARK PATRICK
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PHILIP S WARD.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR KATE KARDOS-POLEVOI.
ORDER - STIPULATION AND ORDER TO RECLASSIFY CASE FROM LIMITED TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF JUN-26-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
